\\u003c/head\\u003e\\n  \\u003cbody\\u003e\\n    \\u003capp-root\\n      data-app-data\\u003d\\\"\\n{\\n  \\u0026quot;quiz\\u0026quot;: [\\n    {\\n      \\u0026quot;question\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;If a digital system is using a 7-bit ASCII code to represent characters, what is the maximum number of unique characters it can distinguish?\\u0026quot;,\\n      \\u0026quot;answerOptions\\u0026quot;: [\\n        {\\n          \\u0026quot;text\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;$128$\\u0026quot;,\\n          \\u0026quot;isCorrect\\u0026quot;: true,\\n          \\u0026quot;rationale\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;In a 7-bit system, the total number of unique combinations is $2^7$, which equals $128$.\\u0026quot;\\n        },\\n        {\\n          \\u0026quot;text\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;$256$\\u0026quot;,\\n          \\u0026quot;isCorrect\\u0026quot;: false,\\n          \\u0026quot;rationale\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;This value represents the capacity of an 8-bit system, such as Extended ASCII, rather than a 7-bit system.\\u0026quot;\\n        },\\n        {\\n          \\u0026quot;text\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;$127$\\u0026quot;,\\n          \\u0026quot;isCorrect\\u0026quot;: false,\\n          \\u0026quot;rationale\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;A common mistake is subtracting one from the total count of combinations, but zero is a valid representation.\\u0026quot;\\n        },\\n        {\\n          \\u0026quot;text\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;$64$\\u0026quot;,\\n          \\u0026quot;isCorrect\\u0026quot;: false,\\n          \\u0026quot;rationale\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;This would be the capacity for a 6-bit system ($2^6$), which is insufficient for the standard ASCII set.\\u0026quot;\\n        }\\n      ],\\n      \\u0026quot;hint\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;Consider the mathematical relationship between the number of bits and the total possible unique binary combinations.\\u0026quot;\\n    },\\n    {\\n      \\u0026quot;question\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;When converting the hexadecimal value $BFA2_{16}$ to its binary equivalent using the 4-bit substitution method, what is the resulting sequence for the most significant digit?\\u0026quot;,\\n      \\u0026quot;answerOptions\\u0026quot;: [\\n        {\\n          \\u0026quot;text\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;$1011$\\u0026quot;,\\n          \\u0026quot;isCorrect\\u0026quot;: true,\\n          \\u0026quot;rationale\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;The hexadecimal digit $B$ corresponds to the decimal value $11$, which is represented as $1011$ in 4-bit binary.\\u0026quot;\\n        },\\n        {\\n          \\u0026quot;text\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;$1100$\\u0026quot;,\\n          \\u0026quot;isCorrect\\u0026quot;: false,\\n          \\u0026quot;rationale\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;This binary sequence represents the hexadecimal digit $C$ ($12$ in decimal), following $B$ in the sequence.\\u0026quot;\\n        },\\n        {\\n          \\u0026quot;text\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;$1010$\\u0026quot;,\\n          \\u0026quot;isCorrect\\u0026quot;: false,\\n          \\u0026quot;rationale\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;This sequence represents $A$ ($10$ in decimal), which is one value lower than the required digit $B$.\\u0026quot;\\n        },\\n        {\\n          \\u0026quot;text\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;$1111$\\u0026quot;,\\n          \\u0026quot;isCorrect\\u0026quot;: false,\\n          \\u0026quot;rationale\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;This represents $F$ ($15$ in decimal), which is the highest single-digit value in hexadecimal.\\u0026quot;\\n        }\\n      ],\\n      \\u0026quot;hint\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;Identify the decimal value of the letter $B$ in the hexadecimal system before converting to binary.\\u0026quot;\\n    },\\n    {\\n      \\u0026quot;question\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;In the context of Boolean functions, which representation specifically requires identifying the truth table entries where the output function result is $1$ and combining them using addition?\\u0026quot;,\\n      \\u0026quot;answerOptions\\u0026quot;: [\\n        {\\n          \\u0026quot;text\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;Sum of Product (SOP)\\u0026quot;,\\n          \\u0026quot;isCorrect\\u0026quot;: true,\\n          \\u0026quot;rationale\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;SOP uses minterms to represent every instance where the function evaluates to true, or $1$.\\u0026quot;\\n        },\\n        {\\n          \\u0026quot;text\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;Product of Sum (POS)\\u0026quot;,\\n          \\u0026quot;isCorrect\\u0026quot;: false,\\n          \\u0026quot;rationale\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;POS identifies where the function results in $0$ and uses maxterms combined with multiplication.\\u0026quot;\\n        },\\n        {\\n          \\u0026quot;text\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;Minterm Logic Expansion\\u0026quot;,\\n          \\u0026quot;isCorrect\\u0026quot;: false,\\n          \\u0026quot;rationale\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;While minterms are used, this is a component of the representation rather than the name of the representation itself.\\u0026quot;\\n        },\\n        {\\n          \\u0026quot;text\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;Binary Logic Gates\\u0026quot;,\\n          \\u0026quot;isCorrect\\u0026quot;: false,\\n          \\u0026quot;rationale\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;Logic gates are hardware implementations, whereas the question refers to the symbolic Boolean representation.\\u0026quot;\\n        }\\n      ],\\n      \\u0026quot;hint\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;Look for the method that focuses on summing terms where the outcome is high.\\u0026quot;\\n    },\\n    {\\n      \\u0026quot;question\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;What is the result of performing binary multiplication on the values $1101_2$ and $011_2$?\\u0026quot;,\\n      \\u0026quot;answerOptions\\u0026quot;: [\\n        {\\n          \\u0026quot;text\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;$100111_2$\\u0026quot;,\\n          \\u0026quot;isCorrect\\u0026quot;: true,\\n          \\u0026quot;rationale\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;Multiplying $13$ ($1101$) by $3$ ($011$) yields $39$, which is $100111$ in binary ($32+4+2+1$).\\u0026quot;\\n        },\\n        {\\n          \\u0026quot;text\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;$111111_2$\\u0026quot;,\\n          \\u0026quot;isCorrect\\u0026quot;: false,\\n          \\u0026quot;rationale\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;This result would suggest a simple addition of bits or an error in shifting partial products.\\u0026quot;\\n        },\\n        {\\n          \\u0026quot;text\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;$100011_2$\\u0026quot;,\\n          \\u0026quot;isCorrect\\u0026quot;: false,\\n          \\u0026quot;rationale\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;This misses a partial product or contains a calculation error in the intermediate sum.\\u0026quot;\\n        },\\n        {\\n          \\u0026quot;text\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;$110111_2$\\u0026quot;,\\n          \\u0026quot;isCorrect\\u0026quot;: false,\\n          \\u0026quot;rationale\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;This incorrect value may occur if one forgets to shift the partial products during the multiplication process.\\u0026quot;\\n        }\\n      ],\\n      \\u0026quot;hint\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;Perform the operation similarly to long multiplication in decimal, but use base-$2$ addition for partial products.\\u0026quot;\\n    },\\n    {\\n      \\u0026quot;question\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;Which of the following is a primary application of hexadecimal number systems in modern computing environments?\\u0026quot;,\\n      \\u0026quot;answerOptions\\u0026quot;: [\\n        {\\n          \\u0026quot;text\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;Memory Addressing\\u0026quot;,\\n          \\u0026quot;isCorrect\\u0026quot;: true,\\n          \\u0026quot;rationale\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;Hexadecimal provides a human-readable shorthand for the long binary strings used in addressing memory locations.\\u0026quot;\\n        },\\n        {\\n          \\u0026quot;text\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;Analog Signal Processing\\u0026quot;,\\n          \\u0026quot;isCorrect\\u0026quot;: false,\\n          \\u0026quot;rationale\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;Analog signals deal with continuous values, whereas hexadecimal is a discrete digital representation.\\u0026quot;\\n        },\\n        {\\n          \\u0026quot;text\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;Generating Sine Waves\\u0026quot;,\\n          \\u0026quot;isCorrect\\u0026quot;: false,\\n          \\u0026quot;rationale\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;Sine waves are characteristic of analog systems, while hexadecimal is strictly for digital numerical representation.\\u0026quot;\\n        },\\n        {\\n          \\u0026quot;text\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;Mechanical Gear Rotation\\u0026quot;,\\n          \\u0026quot;isCorrect\\u0026quot;: false,\\n          \\u0026quot;rationale\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;This refers to physical mechanical systems rather than digital computer data representation.\\u0026quot;\\n        }\\n      ],\\n      \\u0026quot;hint\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;Think about how computers efficiently display long strings of data for developers and system architects.\\u0026quot;\\n    },\\n    {\\n      \\u0026quot;question\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;To represent the decimal value $-63$ as an 8-bit binary number using 2\\u0026#39;s complement, what is the final step after finding the 1\\u0026#39;s complement?\\u0026quot;,\\n      \\u0026quot;answerOptions\\u0026quot;: [\\n        {\\n          \\u0026quot;text\\u0026quot;: \\u0026quot;Add
